categories.title: Las Vegas Concerts and Residencies
categories.description: Find concerts, residency nights, and live-music experiences that help visitors choose a real Vegas show night instead of scrolling broad entertainment noise.
categories.intro: Concert and residency planning in Las Vegas works best when the page answers the big question first: Sphere or another premium headline room, a residency or artist-led night, or an easier concert/comedy option that still feels worth dressing up for. This category should lead with the show-night lanes people actually compare before they dig into the full ticket inventory.
categories.inventoryTitle: Top Las Vegas Concerts & Residencies Right Now
bullets: Best fit for travelers choosing one headline Vegas night rather than browsing generic entertainment lists
Useful for comparing Sphere, residencies, Strip production rooms, and simpler concert or comedy options
Easy to pair with dinner, club plans, or one premium night in a shorter trip
Strong option when the decision is about venue feel, production level, and artist priority, not just ticket availability

intents.label: Sphere concert series
intents.description: The premium lane for immersive-format headline nights and the clearest marquee Vegas concert answer.

intents.label: Residency shows
intents.description: Best for visitors planning around one artist, one room, or one classic Vegas-style production night.

intents.label: Headliner concerts
intents.description: Useful when the trip revolves around a current major act rather than a broad entertainment crawl.

intents.label: Magic and comedy concerts
intents.query: las vegas comedy and magic shows
intents.description: A cleaner fallback for easier budgets, shorter planning windows, or same-night ticket decisions.

categories.title: Las Vegas Residencies
categories.description: Find residency nights, headline Strip concerts, and easier Vegas magic or comedy options that still feel worth dressing up for.
categories.intro: Residency planning in Las Vegas works best when the page answers the comparison visitors are actually making: one premium headliner, one Cirque-style production room, or a lower-friction magic or comedy ticket that still feels like a real Vegas night. This page should lead with those lanes instead of letting broad entertainment noise bury the decision.
categories.inventoryTitle: Top Las Vegas Residencies Right Now
bullets: Best fit for travelers choosing one dress-up night instead of browsing a generic show list
Useful for comparing headline residencies, Cirque-style production nights, and easier same-night ticket options
Easy to pair with dinner, cocktails, or a bigger Strip night without overbuilding the itinerary
Strong option when the decision is more about production level and name value than venue-only browsing

intents.query: las vegas residency shows adele carrie underwood jlo
intents.description: Best for visitors planning around one premium headliner and one signature Vegas room.
